_comment: Per-machine repo map for scripts/work-in-motion-sweep.js. COPY this file to `wim-repos.json` (same dir; gitignored — it never ships in the kit per harness-hygiene: no machine paths, org names, or account names in committed files) and edit to your machine. Each entry: repoKey (short id used in node ids), path (repo root; ~ expands), rootNodeId/rootTitle (the project root node in the workstreams tree; defaults derive from repoKey), ghAccount (gh login that can see this repo's remote, for the auth-switch PR fallback; null to skip switching). Alternative locations: ~/.claude/local/wim-sweep-repos.json, or any file named by the WIM_SWEEP_REPOS_FILE env var (highest precedence).
